This chatbot was developed by students of Saranathan College of Engineering as a college enquiry assistant project.

Team Members: Aravinthan B, Gabelo Marian S, Kabilan M.
I am the SCE AI Assistant, your college enquiry chatbot.
You can call me the Saranathan College AI Assistant. I'm here to help you with college information.

Saranathan College of Engineering (SCE) is a well-known engineering college located in Tiruchirappalli, Tamil Nadu. It was established in 1998 and is affiliated with Anna University and approved by AICTE. The college provides quality technical education with modern infrastructure and strong placement support.

Saranathan College of Engineering (SCE), founded in 1998, is a premier autonomous institution in Tiruchirappalli. It is affiliated with Anna University, approved by AICTE, and offers quality education with excellent infrastructure and placement opportunities.

Saranathan College of Engineering offers both undergraduate and postgraduate programs.

UG Courses (4 years):
• CSE, IT, ECE
• EEE, Mechanical, Civil
• AI & DS, AI & ML, CSBS

PG Courses (2 years):
• M.E specializations
• MBA

Admissions are based on TNEA counselling.

The fee structure at Saranathan College of Engineering depends on the admission category.

• Government Quota (TNEA): ₹50,000 – ₹65,000 per year
• Management Quota: ₹80,000 – ₹1,20,000 per year

Additional charges may vary based on course and category.

Yes, students can avail various scholarships such as:

• Government Scholarships (SC/ST, BC/MBC)
• First Graduate Scholarship
• Merit-based scholarships

Eligibility depends on government norms and student category.

patterns: how far is hostel from college
responses:
• Boys Hostel: Located on campus with shared rooms.
• Girls Hostel: Located 6 km away with free transport.
• Facilities: Clean rooms, water, electricity, and security.
• Food: Hygienic vegetarian meals are provided.
• Fees: Approximately ₹80,000–₹90,000 per year.

patterns: what subjects in first year engineering
what do we study in engineering
responses:
In the first year, all engineering branches follow a common curriculum including:

• Engineering Mathematics I & II
• Engineering Physics
• Engineering Chemistry
• Engineering Mechanics
• Basic Electrical & Electronics Engineering
• Engineering Graphics
• Programming and Problem Solving

From the second year onwards, subjects are based on the chosen department.
The campus has a hygienic canteen providing South Indian meals, snacks, tea, and beverages at affordable prices.

Saranathan College of Engineering has a strong placement record (around 75–85%).

• Highest Package: ₹8–15 LPA
• Average Package: ₹4–6 LPA

Top recruiters include TCS, Infosys, Cognizant, Wipro, HCL, and Zoho.

The Training and Placement Cell provides aptitude training, technical skills, soft skills, resume building, and mock interviews.
The Principal of Saranathan College of Engineering is Dr. D. Valavan, M.Tech., Ph.D.

Approximate cutoff ranges:
• CSE: 180+
• IT: 175+
• ECE: 170+
• EEE: 165+
• Mechanical: 160+
• Civil: 155+

Cutoffs vary every year based on TNEA counselling.

Admission process:
1. Register on TNEA website
2. Fill application details
3. Upload documents
4. Attend counselling
5. Choose SCE based on cutoff
6. Confirm seat allotment

To be eligible for undergraduate engineering programs, candidates must have completed 12th standard with Physics, Chemistry, and Mathematics.

Admissions are based on TNEA counselling using these marks.
The college provides bus facilities covering various routes in and around Tiruchirappalli for safe and convenient student transport.

Heads of Departments:

• CSE: Dr. V. Punitha
• IT: Dr. R. Thillaikarasi
• AI & DS: Dr. S. Ravimaran
• AI & ML: Dr. A. Delphin Carolina Rani
• CSBS: Dr. S. Venkatasubramanian
• ECE: Dr. M. Santhi

• IC: Dr. M. Shanmugavalli
• Civil: Dr. A. Belin Jude
• Mechanical: Dr. R. Rekha
• MBA: Dr. K. Karthikeyan
Saranathan College has qualified faculty including Professors, Associate Professors, and Assistant Professors across all departments.
